import pandas as pd
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA

def task_func(df):
    # Standardize the data to ensure each feature has zero mean and unit variance
    standardized_df = (df - df.mean()) / df.std()

    # Perform Principal Component Analysis on the standardized DataFrame
    pca = PCA(n_components=2)
    transformed_df = pca.fit_transform(standardized_df)

    # Create a new DataFrame with the first two principal components as columns
    df_pca = pd.DataFrame(data=transformed_df, columns=['PC1', 'PC2'])

    # Get the explained variance ratios of the first two principal components
    explained_var = [pca.explained_variance_ratio_[0], pca.explained_variance_ratio_[1]]

    return df_pca, explained_var
